nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Abigail Boteler was born in 1438, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall, was 40 and her mother, Lady Alice Plumpton, was 38. She had at least 1 daughter with Thomas Grith. She died on 10 September 1475, in Ramsey, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Abigail Boteler est née en 1438, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Plumpton, avait 38 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Thomas Grith. Elle est décédée le 10 septembre 1475, à Ramsey, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Abigail Boteler 1438 in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall 40 und ihre Mutter Lady Alice Plumpton 38. Sie hatte mit Thomas Grith mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 10. September 1475 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Ramsey, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Boteler è nata il nel 1438 nel Ipswich, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice Plumpton, aveva 38 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Thomas Grith. Morì il 10 settembre 1475, nel Ramsey, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Abigail Boteler(이)가 1438년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이프스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Plumpton(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 Thomas Grith(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1475년 9월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 램지에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abigail Boteler родилась в 1438 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Plumpton, 38. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Thomas Grith. Она умерла 10 сентября 1475 г. в местности рамси, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет.
